{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}

{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nakuno Shrine'''|奈具神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tango Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==
